scripts.dev: concurrently "PORT=${API_PORT:-4001} npm run dev -w @niha/api" "EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=${EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL:-http://localhost:${API_PORT:-4001}} EXPO_PORT=${EXPO_PORT:-8082} npm run dev -w @niha/mobile"
scripts.dev:mobile:lan: EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=${EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL:-http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0 2>/dev/null || ipconfig getifaddr en1 2>/dev/null || echo localhost):${API_PORT:-4001}} npm run dev -w @niha/mobile
scripts.build: npm run build -w @niha/api && npm run build -w @niha/mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @niha/api && npm run typecheck -w @niha/mobile
